                    background_normal: ''
                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'


<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
        RoundedRectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size
            radius: [dp(6)]
    Label:
        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    # --- 首页属性 ---
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])

    # --- ASR 属性 ---
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    asr_display = StringProperty('离线识别(内置)')
    asr_names = ListProperty(ASR_NAMES)
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')
    funasr_test_result = StringProperty('')
    groq_key = StringProperty('')
    openai_key = StringProperty('')

    # --- 离线模型属性 ---
    model_ready = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_status = StringProperty('检查中...')
    model_downloading = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_dl_progress = NumericProperty(0)

    # --- LLM 属性 ---
    llm_provider = StringProperty('zhipu')
    llm_display = StringProperty('智谱GLM')
    llm_names = ListProperty(LLM_NAMES)
    llm_key = StringProperty('')
    llm_model_name = StringProperty('glm-4')
    llm_test_result = StringProperty('')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 2)
        return root

    # ==================== 配置管理 ====================

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {
            'asr_provider': 'sherpa_offline',
            'llm_provider': 'zhipu',
            'asr_keys': {},
            'llm_keys': {},
        }
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except Exception:
            pass

        # 加载 ASR
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.asr_display = ASR_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.asr_provider, '离线识别(内置)')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
        self.groq_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')

        # 加载 LLM
        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        self._config['llm_provider'] = self.llm_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== ASR 设置 ====================

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        new_id = ASR_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.asr_provider:
            return
        self.asr_provider = new_id
        self.asr_display = text
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text:
            return
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            if ':' not in ip_text:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
            else:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()

    def save_api_key(self, provider, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(provider, {})['key'] = key
        if provider == 'groq_whisper':
            self.groq_key = key
        elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
            self.openai_key = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_funasr(self):
        self.funasr_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_funasr_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_funasr_thread(self):
        import requests
        url = self.funasr_server.rstrip('/')
        try:
            r = requests.get(f'{url}/health', timeout=5)
            if r.status_code == 200:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'服务异常: HTTP {r.status_code}')
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='无法连接，请检查IP和WiFi')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    # ==================== 离线模型管理 ====================

    def _get_model_dir(self):
        builtin = os.path.join(APP_DIR, 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            return builtin
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    def _check_model_status(self):
        model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
        model_file = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
        if os.path.exists(model_file):
            size_mb = os.path.getsize(model_file) // (1024 * 1024)
            self.model_ready = True
            self.model_status = f'已就绪 ({size_mb}MB)'
        else:
            self.model_ready = False
            self.model_status = '未下载 (约80MB)'

    def download_model_async(self):
        if self.model_downloading:
            return
        self.model_downloading = True
        self.model_dl_progress = 0
        self.model_status = '正在下载...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._download_model_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _download_model_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.model_download import download_model
            model_dir = self._get_model_dir()

            def progress_cb(msg):
                # 解析百分比
                import re
                m = re.search(r'(\d+)%', msg)
                if m:
                    self._update_ui(model_dl_progress=int(m.group(1)), model_status=msg)
                else:
                    self._update_ui(model_status=msg)

            download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
            self._update_ui(
                model_ready=True,
                model_status='下载完成',
                model_downloading=False,
                model_dl_progress=100,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 1)
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(
                model_status=f'下载失败: {str(e)[:40]}',
                model_downloading=False,
            )

    # ==================== LLM 设置 ====================

    def on_llm_change(self, text):
        new_id = LLM_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.llm_provider:
            return
        # 保存旧的key
        if self.llm_key:
            self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
                self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = self.llm_key

        self.llm_provider = new_id
        self.llm_display = text
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(new_id, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(new_id, {}).get('key', '')
        self.llm_test_result = ''
        self._save_config()

    def save_llm_key(self, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self.llm_key = key
        self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
            self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_llm(self):
        if not self.llm_key:
            self.llm_test_result = '请先输入API Key'
            return
        self.llm_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_llm_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_llm_thread(self):
        import requests
        pid = self.llm_provider
        key = self.llm_key
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(pid, {})
        endpoint = info.get('endpoint', '')
        model = info.get('default_model', '')

        try:
            if pid == 'claude':
                headers = {
                    'x-api-key': key,
                    'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }
            else:
                headers = {
                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }

            resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=15)
            if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                err = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else f'HTTP {resp.status_code}'
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {err}')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    def save_all_settings(self):
        """保存所有设置并返回首页"""
        # 收集当前UI状态
        try:
            funasr_input = self.root.ids.get('funasr_ip_input')
            if funasr_input:
                self.save_funasr_ip(funasr_input.text)
            groq_input = self.root.ids.get('groq_key_input')
            if groq_input:
                self.save_api_key('groq_whisper', groq_input.text)
            openai_input = self.root.ids.get('openai_key_input')
            if openai_input:
                self.save_api_key('openai_whisper', openai_input.text)
            llm_input = self.root.ids.get('llm_key_input')
            if llm_input:
                self.save_llm_key(llm_input.text)
        except Exception:
            pass

        self._save_config()
        self.root.ids.sm.current = 'home'
        self.status_text = '设置已保存'

    # ==================== 文件选择 ====================

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音',
                    filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档',
                    filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== 微信Intent ====================

    def _check_intent(self):
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    # ==================== 对比流程 ====================

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  ->  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty, BooleanProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

from core.config import (
    ASR_PROVIDERS, LLM_PROVIDERS,
    ASR_MAP, ASR_MAP_REVERSE, LLM_MAP, LLM_MAP_REVERSE,
    ASR_NAMES, LLM_NAMES,
)

            on_release: sm.current = 'home' if sm.current != 'home' else 'settings'

    # ScreenManager

        id: sm

        # ==================== 首页 ====================
        Screen:
            name: 'home'

                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'

                    # 微信导入提示

                            spacing: dp(4)
                            Label:
                                text: '模型:'
                                size_hint_x: 0.15
                                font_size: dp(11)
                                color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                                halign: 'right'
                                text_size: self.size
                                valign: 'center'
                            Label:
                                text: app.llm_model_name
                                size_hint_x: 0.85
                                font_size: dp(11)
                                color: 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1
                                halign: 'left'
                                text_size: self.size
                                valign: 'center'

                        BoxLayout:
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(36)
                            spacing: dp(8)
                            Button:
                                text: '测试连接'
                                size_hint_x: 0.3
                                font_size: dp(12)
                                background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                                background_normal: ''
                                on_release: app.test_llm()
                            Label:
                                text: app.llm_test_result
                                size_hint_x: 0.7
                                font_size: dp(12)
                                color: 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1
                                halign: 'left'
                                text_size: self.size
                                valign: 'center'

                        # LLM独立保存按钮
                        Button:
                            text: '保存大模型配置'
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(42)
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.save_llm_settings()

                    # 完成并返回按钮
                    Button:
                        text: '完成并返回'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(48)
                        font_size: dp(16)
                        background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.return_from_settings()

                    # 底部间距
                    Widget:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(20)

        # ==================== 结果页 ====================
        Screen:
            name: 'result'
            BoxLayout:
                orientation: 'vertical'
                padding: dp(12)
                spacing: dp(8)

                Label:
                    text: app.result_summary
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(80)
                    font_size: dp(15)
                    color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
                    text_size: self.width, None
                    halign: 'center'

                ScrollView:
                    RecycleView:
                        id: diff_rv
                        viewclass: 'DiffItem'
                        data: app.diff_items
                        RecycleBoxLayout:
                            orientation: 'vertical'
                            default_size: None, dp(72)
                            default_size_hint: 1, None
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: self.minimum_height
                            spacing: dp(4)

                Button:
                    text: '返回首页'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(48)
                    font_size: dp(16)
                    background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                    background_normal: ''
                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'


<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
        RoundedRectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size
            radius: [dp(6)]
    Label:
        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    # --- 首页属性 ---
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])

    # --- ASR 属性 ---
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    asr_display = StringProperty('离线识别(内置)')
    asr_names = ListProperty(ASR_NAMES)
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')
    funasr_test_result = StringProperty('')
    groq_key = StringProperty('')
    openai_key = StringProperty('')

    # --- 离线模型属性 ---
    model_ready = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_status = StringProperty('检查中...')
    model_downloading = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_dl_progress = NumericProperty(0)

    # --- LLM 属性 ---
    llm_provider = StringProperty('zhipu')
    llm_display = StringProperty('智谱GLM')
    llm_names = ListProperty(LLM_NAMES)
    llm_key = StringProperty('')
    llm_model_name = StringProperty('glm-4')
    llm_test_result = StringProperty('')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 2)
        return root

    # ==================== 配置管理 ====================

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {
            'asr_provider': 'sherpa_offline',
            'llm_provider': 'zhipu',
            'asr_keys': {},
            'llm_keys': {},
        }
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except Exception:
            pass

        # 加载 ASR
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.asr_display = ASR_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.asr_provider, '离线识别(内置)')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
        self.groq_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')

        # 加载 LLM
        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        self._config['llm_provider'] = self.llm_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== ASR 设置 ====================

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        new_id = ASR_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.asr_provider:
            return
        self.asr_provider = new_id
        self.asr_display = text
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text:
            return
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            if ':' not in ip_text:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
            else:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()

    def save_api_key(self, provider, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(provider, {})['key'] = key
        if provider == 'groq_whisper':
            self.groq_key = key
        elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
            self.openai_key = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_funasr(self):
        self.funasr_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_funasr_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_funasr_thread(self):
        import requests
        url = self.funasr_server.rstrip('/')
        try:
            r = requests.get(f'{url}/health', timeout=5)
            if r.status_code == 200:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'服务异常: HTTP {r.status_code}')
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='无法连接，请检查IP和WiFi')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    # ==================== 离线模型管理 ====================

    def _get_model_dir(self):
        builtin = os.path.join(APP_DIR, 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            return builtin
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    def _check_model_status(self):
        model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
        model_file = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
        if os.path.exists(model_file):
            size_mb = os.path.getsize(model_file) // (1024 * 1024)
            self.model_ready = True
            self.model_status = f'已就绪 ({size_mb}MB)'
        else:
            self.model_ready = False
            self.model_status = '未下载 (约80MB)'

    def download_model_async(self):
        if self.model_downloading:
            return
        self.model_downloading = True
        self.model_dl_progress = 0
        self.model_status = '正在下载...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._download_model_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _download_model_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.model_download import download_model
            model_dir = self._get_model_dir()

            def progress_cb(msg):
                # 解析百分比
                import re
                m = re.search(r'(\d+)%', msg)
                if m:
                    self._update_ui(model_dl_progress=int(m.group(1)), model_status=msg)
                else:
                    self._update_ui(model_status=msg)

            download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
            self._update_ui(
                model_ready=True,
                model_status='下载完成',
                model_downloading=False,
                model_dl_progress=100,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 1)
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(
                model_status=f'下载失败: {str(e)[:40]}',
                model_downloading=False,
            )

    # ==================== LLM 设置 ====================

    def on_llm_change(self, text):
        new_id = LLM_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.llm_provider:
            return
        # 保存旧的key
        if self.llm_key:
            self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
                self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = self.llm_key

        self.llm_provider = new_id
        self.llm_display = text
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(new_id, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(new_id, {}).get('key', '')
        self.llm_test_result = ''
        self._save_config()

    def save_llm_key(self, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self.llm_key = key
        self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
            self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_llm(self):
        if not self.llm_key:
            self.llm_test_result = '请先输入API Key'
            return
        self.llm_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_llm_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_llm_thread(self):
        import requests
        pid = self.llm_provider
        key = self.llm_key
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(pid, {})
        endpoint = info.get('endpoint', '')
        model = info.get('default_model', '')

        try:
            if pid == 'claude':
                headers = {
                    'x-api-key': key,
                    'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }
            else:
                headers = {
                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }

            resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=15)
            if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                err = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else f'HTTP {resp.status_code}'
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {err}')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    def save_all_settings(self):
        """保存所有设置并返回首页"""
        # 收集当前UI状态
        try:
            funasr_input = self.root.ids.get('funasr_ip_input')
            if funasr_input:
                self.save_funasr_ip(funasr_input.text)
            groq_input = self.root.ids.get('groq_key_input')
            if groq_input:
                self.save_api_key('groq_whisper', groq_input.text)
            openai_input = self.root.ids.get('openai_key_input')
            if openai_input:
                self.save_api_key('openai_whisper', openai_input.text)
            llm_input = self.root.ids.get('llm_key_input')
            if llm_input:
                self.save_llm_key(llm_input.text)
        except Exception:
            pass

        self._save_config()
        self.root.ids.sm.current = 'home'
        self.status_text = '设置已保存'

    # ==================== 文件选择 ====================

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音',
                    filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档',
                    filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== 微信Intent ====================

    def _check_intent(self):
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    # ==================== 对比流程 ====================

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  ->  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

    openai_key = StringProperty('')

    # --- Groq内置密钥 ---

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

    ASR_PROVIDERS, LLM_PROVIDERS,
    ASR_MAP, ASR_MAP_REVERSE, LLM_MAP, LLM_MAP_REVERSE,
    ASR_NAMES, LLM_NAMES,
)

            radius: [dp(6)]
    Label:
        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    # --- 首页属性 ---
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])

    # --- ASR 属性 ---
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    asr_display = StringProperty('离线识别(内置)')
    asr_names = ListProperty(ASR_NAMES)
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')
    funasr_test_result = StringProperty('')
    groq_key = StringProperty('')
    openai_key = StringProperty('')

    # --- 离线模型属性 ---
    model_ready = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_status = StringProperty('检查中...')
    model_downloading = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_dl_progress = NumericProperty(0)

    # --- LLM 属性 ---
    llm_provider = StringProperty('zhipu')
    llm_display = StringProperty('智谱GLM')
    llm_names = ListProperty(LLM_NAMES)
    llm_key = StringProperty('')
    llm_model_name = StringProperty('glm-4')
    llm_test_result = StringProperty('')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 2)
        return root

    # ==================== 配置管理 ====================

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {
            'asr_provider': 'sherpa_offline',
            'llm_provider': 'zhipu',
            'asr_keys': {},
            'llm_keys': {},
        }
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except Exception:
            pass

        # 加载 ASR
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.asr_display = ASR_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.asr_provider, '离线识别(内置)')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
        self.groq_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')

        # 加载 LLM
        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        self._config['llm_provider'] = self.llm_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== ASR 设置 ====================

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        new_id = ASR_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.asr_provider:
            return
        self.asr_provider = new_id
        self.asr_display = text
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text:
            return
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            if ':' not in ip_text:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
            else:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()

    def save_api_key(self, provider, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(provider, {})['key'] = key
        if provider == 'groq_whisper':
            self.groq_key = key
        elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
            self.openai_key = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_funasr(self):
        self.funasr_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_funasr_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_funasr_thread(self):
        import requests
        url = self.funasr_server.rstrip('/')
        try:
            r = requests.get(f'{url}/health', timeout=5)
            if r.status_code == 200:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'服务异常: HTTP {r.status_code}')
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='无法连接，请检查IP和WiFi')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    # ==================== 离线模型管理 ====================

    def _get_model_dir(self):
        builtin = os.path.join(APP_DIR, 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            return builtin
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    def _check_model_status(self):
        model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
        model_file = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
        if os.path.exists(model_file):
            size_mb = os.path.getsize(model_file) // (1024 * 1024)
            self.model_ready = True
            self.model_status = f'已就绪 ({size_mb}MB)'
        else:
            self.model_ready = False
            self.model_status = '未下载 (约80MB)'

    def download_model_async(self):
        if self.model_downloading:
            return
        self.model_downloading = True
        self.model_dl_progress = 0
        self.model_status = '正在下载...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._download_model_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _download_model_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.model_download import download_model
            model_dir = self._get_model_dir()

            def progress_cb(msg):
                # 解析百分比
                import re
                m = re.search(r'(\d+)%', msg)
                if m:
                    self._update_ui(model_dl_progress=int(m.group(1)), model_status=msg)
                else:
                    self._update_ui(model_status=msg)

            download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
            self._update_ui(
                model_ready=True,
                model_status='下载完成',
                model_downloading=False,
                model_dl_progress=100,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 1)
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(
                model_status=f'下载失败: {str(e)[:40]}',
                model_downloading=False,
            )

    # ==================== LLM 设置 ====================

    def on_llm_change(self, text):
        new_id = LLM_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.llm_provider:
            return
        # 保存旧的key
        if self.llm_key:
            self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
                self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = self.llm_key

        self.llm_provider = new_id
        self.llm_display = text
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(new_id, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(new_id, {}).get('key', '')
        self.llm_test_result = ''
        self._save_config()

    def save_llm_key(self, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self.llm_key = key
        self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
            self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_llm(self):
        if not self.llm_key:
            self.llm_test_result = '请先输入API Key'
            return
        self.llm_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_llm_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_llm_thread(self):
        import requests
        pid = self.llm_provider
        key = self.llm_key
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(pid, {})
        endpoint = info.get('endpoint', '')
        model = info.get('default_model', '')

        try:
            if pid == 'claude':
                headers = {
                    'x-api-key': key,
                    'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }
            else:
                headers = {
                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }

            resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=15)
            if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                err = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else f'HTTP {resp.status_code}'
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {err}')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    def save_all_settings(self):
        """保存所有设置并返回首页"""
        # 收集当前UI状态
        try:
            funasr_input = self.root.ids.get('funasr_ip_input')
            if funasr_input:
                self.save_funasr_ip(funasr_input.text)
            groq_input = self.root.ids.get('groq_key_input')
            if groq_input:
                self.save_api_key('groq_whisper', groq_input.text)
            openai_input = self.root.ids.get('openai_key_input')
            if openai_input:
                self.save_api_key('openai_whisper', openai_input.text)
            llm_input = self.root.ids.get('llm_key_input')
            if llm_input:
                self.save_llm_key(llm_input.text)
        except Exception:
            pass

        self._save_config()
        self.root.ids.sm.current = 'home'
        self.status_text = '设置已保存'

    # ==================== 文件选择 ====================

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音',
                    filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档',
                    filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== 微信Intent ====================

    def _check_intent(self):
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    # ==================== 对比流程 ====================

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  ->  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')

        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')

        # Groq Key: 优先使用配置的，否则使用内置密钥
        groq_saved = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
        if groq_saved and groq_saved != self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY:
            # 用户自定义了密钥
            self.groq_key = groq_saved
            self.groq_key_display = groq_saved[:8] + '...' if len(groq_saved) > 8 else groq_saved
        else:
            # 使用内置密钥
            self.groq_key = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
            self.groq_key_display = '已内置密钥'
            # 保存内置密钥到配置
            self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('groq_whisper', {})['key'] = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY

        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')

        # 加载 LLM
        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', 'glm-4-flash')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')

class VoiceDocApp(App):
    # --- 首页属性 ---
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])

    # --- 对比结果存储（用于生成报告） ---
    _last_audio_text = ''
    _last_doc_text = ''
    _last_result = {}
    _last_report_path = ''

    # --- ASR 属性 ---
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    asr_display = StringProperty('离线识别(内置)')
    asr_names = ListProperty(ASR_NAMES)
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')
    funasr_test_result = StringProperty('')
    groq_key = StringProperty('')
    groq_key_display = StringProperty('已内置密钥')  # 显示用
    openai_key = StringProperty('')

    # --- Groq内置密钥 ---
    GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY = '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'

    # --- 离线模型属性 ---
    model_ready = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_status = StringProperty('检查中...')
    model_downloading = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_dl_progress = NumericProperty(0)

    # --- LLM 属性 ---
    llm_provider = StringProperty('zhipu')
    llm_display = StringProperty('智谱GLM')
    llm_names = ListProperty(LLM_NAMES)
    llm_key = StringProperty('')
    llm_model_name = StringProperty('glm-4-flash')
    llm_test_result = StringProperty('')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 2)
        return root

    # ==================== 配置管理 ====================

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {
            'asr_provider': 'sherpa_offline',
            'llm_provider': 'zhipu',
            'asr_keys': {},
            'llm_keys': {},
        }
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except Exception:
            pass

        # 加载 ASR
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.asr_display = ASR_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.asr_provider, '离线识别(内置)')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
        self.groq_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')

        # 加载 LLM
        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        self._config['llm_provider'] = self.llm_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== ASR 设置 ====================

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        new_id = ASR_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.asr_provider:
            return
        self.asr_provider = new_id
        self.asr_display = text
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text:
            return
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            if ':' not in ip_text:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
            else:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()

    def save_api_key(self, provider, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(provider, {})['key'] = key
        if provider == 'groq_whisper':
            self.groq_key = key
        elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
            self.openai_key = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_funasr(self):
        self.funasr_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_funasr_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_funasr_thread(self):
        import requests
        url = self.funasr_server.rstrip('/')
        try:
            r = requests.get(f'{url}/health', timeout=5)
            if r.status_code == 200:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'服务异常: HTTP {r.status_code}')
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='无法连接，请检查IP和WiFi')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    # ==================== 离线模型管理 ====================

    def _get_model_dir(self):
        builtin = os.path.join(APP_DIR, 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            return builtin
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    def _check_model_status(self):
        model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
        model_file = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
        if os.path.exists(model_file):
            size_mb = os.path.getsize(model_file) // (1024 * 1024)
            self.model_ready = True
            self.model_status = f'已就绪 ({size_mb}MB)'
        else:
            self.model_ready = False
            self.model_status = '未下载 (约80MB)'

    def download_model_async(self):
        if self.model_downloading:
            return
        self.model_downloading = True
        self.model_dl_progress = 0
        self.model_status = '正在下载...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._download_model_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _download_model_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.model_download import download_model
            model_dir = self._get_model_dir()

            def progress_cb(msg):
                # 解析百分比
                import re
                m = re.search(r'(\d+)%', msg)
                if m:
                    self._update_ui(model_dl_progress=int(m.group(1)), model_status=msg)
                else:
                    self._update_ui(model_status=msg)

            download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
            self._update_ui(
                model_ready=True,
                model_status='下载完成',
                model_downloading=False,
                model_dl_progress=100,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 1)
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(
                model_status=f'下载失败: {str(e)[:40]}',
                model_downloading=False,
            )

    # ==================== LLM 设置 ====================

    def on_llm_change(self, text):
        new_id = LLM_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.llm_provider:
            return
        # 保存旧的key
        if self.llm_key:
            self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
                self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = self.llm_key

        self.llm_provider = new_id
        self.llm_display = text
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(new_id, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(new_id, {}).get('key', '')
        self.llm_test_result = ''
        self._save_config()

    def save_llm_key(self, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self.llm_key = key
        self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
            self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_llm(self):
        if not self.llm_key:
            self.llm_test_result = '请先输入API Key'
            return
        self.llm_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_llm_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_llm_thread(self):
        import requests
        pid = self.llm_provider
        key = self.llm_key
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(pid, {})
        endpoint = info.get('endpoint', '')
        model = info.get('default_model', '')

        try:
            if pid == 'claude':
                headers = {
                    'x-api-key': key,
                    'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }
            else:
                headers = {
                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }

            resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=15)
            if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                err = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else f'HTTP {resp.status_code}'
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {err}')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    def save_all_settings(self):
        """保存所有设置并返回首页"""
        # 收集当前UI状态
        try:
            funasr_input = self.root.ids.get('funasr_ip_input')
            if funasr_input:
                self.save_funasr_ip(funasr_input.text)
            groq_input = self.root.ids.get('groq_key_input')
            if groq_input:
                self.save_api_key('groq_whisper', groq_input.text)
            openai_input = self.root.ids.get('openai_key_input')
            if openai_input:
                self.save_api_key('openai_whisper', openai_input.text)
            llm_input = self.root.ids.get('llm_key_input')
            if llm_input:
                self.save_llm_key(llm_input.text)
        except Exception:
            pass

        self._save_config()
        self.root.ids.sm.current = 'home'
        self.status_text = '设置已保存'

    # ==================== 文件选择 ====================

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音',
                    filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档',
                    filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== 微信Intent ====================

    def _check_intent(self):
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    # ==================== 对比流程 ====================

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  ->  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty, BooleanProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

from core.config import (
    ASR_PROVIDERS, LLM_PROVIDERS,
    ASR_MAP, ASR_MAP_REVERSE, LLM_MAP, LLM_MAP_REVERSE,
    ASR_NAMES, LLM_NAMES,
)

KV = '''
#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp

BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 0.96, 0.96, 0.94, 1
        Rectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size

    # 顶部标题栏
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None
        height: dp(52)
        padding: dp(12), 0
        spacing: dp(8)
        canvas.before:
            Color:
                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
            Rectangle:
                pos: self.pos
                size: self.size

        Label:
            text: '配音文字核对宝'
            font_size: dp(19)
            bold: True
            color: 1, 1, 1, 1
            halign: 'left'
            valign: 'center'
            text_size: self.size

        Button:
            text: '返回' if sm.current != 'home' else '配置'
            size_hint_x: None
            width: dp(60)
            font_size: dp(14)
            background_color: 0.15, 0.5, 0.75, 1
            background_normal: ''
            on_release: sm.current = 'home' if sm.current != 'home' else 'settings'

    # ScreenManager
    ScreenManager:
        id: sm

        # ==================== 首页 ====================
        Screen:
            name: 'home'
            ScrollView:
                do_scroll_x: False
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: self.minimum_height
                    padding: dp(14)
                    spacing: dp(10)

                    # 微信导入提示
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        padding: dp(10)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 0.88, 0.95, 0.88, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]
                        Label:
                            text: '微信长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用 即可导入'
                            font_size: dp(13)

                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'center'
                            valign: 'center'

                    # 录音文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(50)

                        Button:
                            text: '选择录音'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
