                            on_release: app.pick_audio()
                        Label:
                            text: app.audio_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 文档文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(50)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择文档'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3

                            on_release: app.pick_doc()
                        Label:
                            text: app.doc_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1

                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # ASR引擎快捷选择
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(44)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Label:
                            text: '识别引擎:'
                            size_hint_x: 0.22
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'

                        Spinner:
                            id: home_asr_spinner

                            values: app.asr_names

                    # 开始对比
                    Button:
                        text: '开始对比'

                        height: dp(54)

                    # 状态
                    Label:
                        text: app.status_text
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(34)

                    ProgressBar:
                        value: app.progress
                        max: 100
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(6)

        # ==================== 设置页 ====================
        Screen:
            name: 'settings'
            ScrollView:
                do_scroll_x: False
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'

                    # ---- 语音转写配置标题 ----
                    Label:
                        text: '语音转写引擎'

                        bold: True
                        color: 0.15, 0.15, 0.15, 1
                        halign: 'left'
                        text_size: self.size
                        valign: 'center'

                    # ASR引擎选择
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(44)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Label:
                            text: '当前引擎:'
                            size_hint_x: 0.25
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'
                            text_size: self.size
                            valign: 'center'
                        Spinner:
                            id: settings_asr_spinner
                            text: app.asr_display
                            values: app.asr_names
                            size_hint_x: 0.75
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            on_text: app.on_asr_change(self.text)

                    # ==== Card: 离线识别模型 ====
                    BoxLayout:
                        orientation: 'vertical'

<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1

            radius: [dp(6)]

        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    # --- 首页属性 ---
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])

    # --- 对比结果存储（用于生成报告） ---
    _last_audio_text = ''
    _last_doc_text = ''
    _last_result = {}
    _last_report_path = ''

    # --- ASR 属性 ---
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    asr_display = StringProperty('离线识别(内置)')
    asr_names = ListProperty(ASR_NAMES)
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')
    funasr_test_result = StringProperty('')
    groq_key = StringProperty('')
    groq_key_display = StringProperty('已内置密钥')  # 显示用
    openai_key = StringProperty('')

    # --- Groq内置密钥 ---
    GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY = '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'

    # --- 离线模型属性 ---
    model_ready = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_status = StringProperty('检查中...')
    model_downloading = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_dl_progress = NumericProperty(0)

    # --- LLM 属性 ---
    llm_provider = StringProperty('zhipu')
    llm_display = StringProperty('智谱GLM')
    llm_names = ListProperty(LLM_NAMES)
    llm_key = StringProperty('')
    llm_model_name = StringProperty('glm-4-flash')
    llm_test_result = StringProperty('')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 2)
        return root

    # ==================== 配置管理 ====================

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {
            'asr_provider': 'sherpa_offline',
            'llm_provider': 'zhipu',
            'asr_keys': {},
            'llm_keys': {},
        }
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except Exception:
            pass

        # 加载 ASR
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.asr_display = ASR_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.asr_provider, '离线识别(内置)')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')

        # Groq Key: 优先使用配置的，否则使用内置密钥
        groq_saved = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
        if groq_saved and groq_saved != self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY:
            # 用户自定义了密钥
            self.groq_key = groq_saved
            self.groq_key_display = groq_saved[:8] + '...' if len(groq_saved) > 8 else groq_saved
        else:
            # 使用内置密钥
            self.groq_key = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
            self.groq_key_display = '已内置密钥'
            # 保存内置密钥到配置
            self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('groq_whisper', {})['key'] = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY

        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')

        # 加载 LLM
        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', 'glm-4-flash')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        self._config['llm_provider'] = self.llm_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== ASR 设置 ====================

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        new_id = ASR_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.asr_provider:
            return
        self.asr_provider = new_id
        self.asr_display = text
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text:
            return
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            if ':' not in ip_text:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
            else:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()

    def save_api_key(self, provider, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(provider, {})['key'] = key
        if provider == 'groq_whisper':
            self.groq_key = key
        elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
            self.openai_key = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_funasr(self):
        self.funasr_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_funasr_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_funasr_thread(self):
        import requests
        url = self.funasr_server.rstrip('/')
        try:
            r = requests.get(f'{url}/health', timeout=5)
            if r.status_code == 200:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'服务异常: HTTP {r.status_code}')
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='无法连接，请检查IP和WiFi')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    # ==================== 离线模型管理 ====================

    def _get_model_dir(self):
        builtin = os.path.join(APP_DIR, 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            return builtin
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    def _check_model_status(self):
        model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
        model_file = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
        if os.path.exists(model_file):
            size_mb = os.path.getsize(model_file) // (1024 * 1024)
            self.model_ready = True
            self.model_status = f'已就绪 ({size_mb}MB)'
        else:
            self.model_ready = False
            self.model_status = '未下载 (约80MB)'

    def download_model_async(self):
        if self.model_downloading:
            return
        self.model_downloading = True
        self.model_dl_progress = 0
        self.model_status = '正在下载...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._download_model_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _download_model_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.model_download import download_model
            model_dir = self._get_model_dir()

            def progress_cb(msg):
                # 解析百分比
                import re
                m = re.search(r'(\d+)%', msg)
                if m:
                    self._update_ui(model_dl_progress=int(m.group(1)), model_status=msg)
                else:
                    self._update_ui(model_status=msg)

            download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
            self._update_ui(
                model_ready=True,
                model_status='下载完成',
                model_downloading=False,
                model_dl_progress=100,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 1)
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(
                model_status=f'下载失败: {str(e)[:40]}',
                model_downloading=False,
            )

    # ==================== LLM 设置 ====================

    def on_llm_change(self, text):
        new_id = LLM_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.llm_provider:
            return
        # 保存旧的key
        if self.llm_key:
            self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
                self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = self.llm_key

        self.llm_provider = new_id
        self.llm_display = text
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(new_id, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(new_id, {}).get('key', '')
        self.llm_test_result = ''
        self._save_config()

    def save_llm_key(self, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self.llm_key = key
        self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
            self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_llm(self):
        if not self.llm_key:
            self.llm_test_result = '请先输入API Key'
            return
        self.llm_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_llm_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_llm_thread(self):
        import requests
        pid = self.llm_provider
        key = self.llm_key
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(pid, {})
        endpoint = info.get('endpoint', '')
        model = info.get('default_model', '')

        try:
            if pid == 'claude':
                headers = {
                    'x-api-key': key,
                    'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }
            else:
                headers = {
                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }

            resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=15)
            if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                err = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else f'HTTP {resp.status_code}'
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {err}')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    def save_all_settings(self):
        """保存所有设置并返回首页"""
        # 收集当前UI状态
        try:
            funasr_input = self.root.ids.get('funasr_ip_input')
            if funasr_input:
                self.save_funasr_ip(funasr_input.text)
            groq_input = self.root.ids.get('groq_key_input')
            if groq_input:
                self.save_api_key('groq_whisper', groq_input.text)
            openai_input = self.root.ids.get('openai_key_input')
            if openai_input:
                self.save_api_key('openai_whisper', openai_input.text)
            llm_input = self.root.ids.get('llm_key_input')
            if llm_input:
                self.save_llm_key(llm_input.text)
        except Exception:
            pass

        self._save_config()
        self.root.ids.sm.current = 'home'
        self.status_text = '设置已保存'

    # ==================== 文件选择 ====================

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音',
                    filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档',
                    filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== 微信Intent ====================

    def _check_intent(self):
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    # ==================== 对比流程 ====================

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  ->  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = dict(self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {}))
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            # Groq使用内置密钥
            if self.asr_provider == 'groq_whisper' and not keys.get('key'):
                keys['key'] = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )

                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)

            self._last_doc_text = doc_text

                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  ->  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)

    # ==================== Word报告生成 ====================

    def generate_word_report(self):
        """生成Word对比报告"""
        if not self._last_result:
            self.status_text = '没有可用的对比结果'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在生成报告...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._gen_report_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _gen_report_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.report_gen import generate_report
            path = generate_report(
                audio_path=self.audio_path,
                doc_path=self.doc_path,
                audio_text=self._last_audio_text,
                doc_text=self._last_doc_text,
                result=self._last_result,
            )
            self._last_report_path = path
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'报告已保存: {os.path.basename(path)}')
        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'报告生成失败: {str(e)[:50]}')

    # ==================== 微信分享 ====================

    def share_to_wechat(self):
        """分享报告到微信"""
        if not self._last_report_path:
            # 先生成报告再分享
            if not self._last_result:
                self.status_text = '没有可用的对比结果'
                return
            self.status_text = '正在生成并分享...'
            threading.Thread(target=self._gen_and_share_thread, daemon=True).start()
        else:
            self._do_share(self._last_report_path)

    def _gen_and_share_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.report_gen import generate_report
            path = generate_report(
                audio_path=self.audio_path,
                doc_path=self.doc_path,
                audio_text=self._last_audio_text,
                doc_text=self._last_doc_text,
                result=self._last_result,
            )
            self._last_report_path = path
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._do_share(path))
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'生成报告失败: {str(e)[:50]}')

    def _do_share(self, file_path):
        """执行分享操作"""
        if platform == 'android':
            try:
                from jnius import autoclass
                Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
                PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
                Uri = autoclass('android.net.Uri')
                File = autoclass('java.io.File')
                FileProvider = autoclass('androidx.core.content.FileProvider')

                activity = PythonActivity.mActivity
                file_obj = File(file_path)

                # 使用FileProvider获取content URI（Android 7.0+）
                try:
                    uri = FileProvider.getUriForFile(
                        activity,
                        activity.getPackageName() + '.fileprovider',
                        file_obj
                    )
                except Exception:
                    uri = Uri.fromFile(file_obj)

                intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND)
                intent.setType('application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document')
                intent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM, uri)
                intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)

                chooser = Intent.createChooser(intent, '分享核对报告')
                activity.startActivity(chooser)
                self.status_text = '已打开分享面板'
            except Exception as e:
                self.status_text = f'分享失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
        else:
            self.status_text = f'报告已保存: {file_path}'

else:

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'


<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
        RoundedRectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size
            radius: [dp(6)]
    Label:
        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    # --- 首页属性 ---
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])

    # --- 对比结果存储（用于生成报告） ---
    _last_audio_text = ''
    _last_doc_text = ''
    _last_result = {}
    _last_report_path = ''

    # --- ASR 属性 ---
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    asr_display = StringProperty('离线识别(内置)')
    asr_names = ListProperty(ASR_NAMES)
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')
    funasr_test_result = StringProperty('')
    groq_key = StringProperty('')
    groq_key_display = StringProperty('已内置密钥')  # 显示用
    openai_key = StringProperty('')

    # --- Groq内置密钥 ---
    GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY = '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'

    # --- 离线模型属性 ---
    model_ready = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_status = StringProperty('检查中...')
    model_downloading = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_dl_progress = NumericProperty(0)

    # --- LLM 属性 ---
    llm_provider = StringProperty('zhipu')
    llm_display = StringProperty('智谱GLM')
    llm_names = ListProperty(LLM_NAMES)
    llm_key = StringProperty('')
    llm_model_name = StringProperty('glm-4-flash')
    llm_test_result = StringProperty('')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 2)
        return root

    # ==================== 配置管理 ====================

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {
            'asr_provider': 'sherpa_offline',
            'llm_provider': 'zhipu',
            'asr_keys': {},
            'llm_keys': {},
        }
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except Exception:
            pass

        # 加载 ASR
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.asr_display = ASR_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.asr_provider, '离线识别(内置)')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')

        # Groq Key: 优先使用配置的，否则使用内置密钥
        groq_saved = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
        if groq_saved and groq_saved != self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY:
            # 用户自定义了密钥
            self.groq_key = groq_saved
            self.groq_key_display = groq_saved[:8] + '...' if len(groq_saved) > 8 else groq_saved
        else:
            # 使用内置密钥
            self.groq_key = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
            self.groq_key_display = '已内置密钥'
            # 保存内置密钥到配置
            self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('groq_whisper', {})['key'] = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY

        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')

        # 加载 LLM
        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', 'glm-4-flash')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        self._config['llm_provider'] = self.llm_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== ASR 设置 ====================

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        new_id = ASR_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.asr_provider:
            return
        self.asr_provider = new_id
        self.asr_display = text
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text:
            return
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            if ':' not in ip_text:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
            else:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()

    def save_api_key(self, provider, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(provider, {})['key'] = key
        if provider == 'groq_whisper':
            self.groq_key = key
        elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
            self.openai_key = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_funasr(self):
        self.funasr_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_funasr_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_funasr_thread(self):
        import requests
        url = self.funasr_server.rstrip('/')
        try:
            r = requests.get(f'{url}/health', timeout=5)
            if r.status_code == 200:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'服务异常: HTTP {r.status_code}')
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='无法连接，请检查IP和WiFi')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    # ==================== 离线模型管理 ====================

    def _get_model_dir(self):
        builtin = os.path.join(APP_DIR, 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            return builtin
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    def _check_model_status(self):
        model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
        model_file = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
        if os.path.exists(model_file):
            size_mb = os.path.getsize(model_file) // (1024 * 1024)
            self.model_ready = True
            self.model_status = f'已就绪 ({size_mb}MB)'
        else:
            self.model_ready = False
            self.model_status = '未下载 (约80MB)'

    def download_model_async(self):
        if self.model_downloading:
            return
        self.model_downloading = True
        self.model_dl_progress = 0
        self.model_status = '正在下载...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._download_model_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _download_model_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.model_download import download_model
            model_dir = self._get_model_dir()

            def progress_cb(msg):
                # 解析百分比
                import re
                m = re.search(r'(\d+)%', msg)
                if m:
                    self._update_ui(model_dl_progress=int(m.group(1)), model_status=msg)
                else:
                    self._update_ui(model_status=msg)

            download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
            self._update_ui(
                model_ready=True,
                model_status='下载完成',
                model_downloading=False,
                model_dl_progress=100,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 1)
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(
                model_status=f'下载失败: {str(e)[:40]}',
                model_downloading=False,
            )

    # ==================== LLM 设置 ====================

    def on_llm_change(self, text):
        new_id = LLM_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.llm_provider:
            return
        # 保存旧的key
        if self.llm_key:
            self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
                self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = self.llm_key

        self.llm_provider = new_id
        self.llm_display = text
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(new_id, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(new_id, {}).get('key', '')
        self.llm_test_result = ''
        self._save_config()

    def save_llm_key(self, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self.llm_key = key
        self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
            self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_llm(self):
        if not self.llm_key:
            self.llm_test_result = '请先输入API Key'
            return
        self.llm_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_llm_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_llm_thread(self):
        import requests
        pid = self.llm_provider
        key = self.llm_key
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(pid, {})
        endpoint = info.get('endpoint', '')
        model = info.get('default_model', '')

        try:
            if pid == 'claude':
                headers = {
                    'x-api-key': key,
                    'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }
            elif pid == 'zhipu':
                # 智谱GLM使用标准Bearer Token认证
                # 智谱API Key格式通常为 xxx.yyy 形式
                headers = {
                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'stream': False,
                }
            else:
                headers = {
                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }

            resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=20)
            if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                # 解析错误信息
                try:
                    err_data = resp.json()
                    err_msg = err_data.get('error', {}).get('message', '') or str(err_data)[:60]
                except:
                    err_msg = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else f'HTTP {resp.status_code}'
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'HTTP {resp.status_code}: {err_msg}')
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接失败，请检查网络')
        except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接超时，请重试')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:40]}')

    def save_asr_settings(self):
        """单独保存ASR配置"""
        try:
            funasr_input = self.root.ids.get('funasr_ip_input')
            if funasr_input:
                self.save_funasr_ip(funasr_input.text)
            groq_input = self.root.ids.get('groq_key_input')
            if groq_input:
                text = groq_input.text.strip()
                # 如果用户输入为空或仍为默认文字，使用内置密钥
                if not text or text == '已内置密钥':
                    text = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
                self.save_api_key('groq_whisper', text)
            openai_input = self.root.ids.get('openai_key_input')
            if openai_input:
                self.save_api_key('openai_whisper', openai_input.text)
        except Exception:
            pass
        self._save_config()
        self.status_text = 'ASR配置已保存'

    def save_llm_settings(self):
        """单独保存LLM配置"""
        try:
            llm_input = self.root.ids.get('llm_key_input')
            if llm_input:
                self.save_llm_key(llm_input.text)
        except Exception:
            pass
        self._save_config()
        self.llm_test_result = '大模型配置已保存'

    def return_from_settings(self):
        """完成并返回首页"""
        self.root.ids.sm.current = 'home'
        self.status_text = '就绪'

    # ==================== 文件选择 ====================

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音',
                    filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档',
                    filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== 微信Intent ====================

    def _check_intent(self):
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    # ==================== 对比流程 ====================

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  ->  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

"""语音转录模块 - Android版，使用云端ASR API"""
import os, json, base64, tempfile, subprocess
import requests
from typing import Optional, Callable


def _convert_silk_to_wav(silk_path, output_path=None):
    """将微信SILK/AMR格式音频转为WAV
    微信语音消息格式：.amr 或 .silk（实际是silk v3编码）
    """
    if output_path is None:
        output_path = silk_path.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '.wav'

    # 尝试用ffmpeg转换（支持amr和大部分格式）
    try:
        subprocess.run([
            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', silk_path,
            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',
            output_path
        ], capture_output=True, timeout=30)
        if os.path.exists(output_path) and os.path.getsize(output_path) > 100:
            return output_path
    except:
        pass

    # 尝试用silk-decoder（针对silk v3格式）
    try:
        subprocess.run(['silk_decoder', silk_path, output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')],
                       capture_output=True, timeout=10)
        pcm_path = output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')
        if os.path.exists(pcm_path):
            subprocess.run([
                'ffmpeg', '-y', '-f', 's16le', '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1',
                '-i', pcm_path, output_path
            ], capture_output=True, timeout=10)
            os.remove(pcm_path)
            if os.path.exists(output_path):
                return output_path
    except:
        pass

    return silk_path  # 返回原文件，让ASR尝试处理


def preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb=None):
    """音频预处理：格式转换 + 重采样"""
    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()

    # 微信语音格式需要特殊处理
    if ext in ('.silk', '.amr', '.slk'):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('正在转换微信语音格式...')
        wav_path = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_converted.wav'
        return _convert_silk_to_wav(filepath, wav_path)

    # 其他格式用ffmpeg统一转为16kHz WAV
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在预处理音频...')
    out = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_preprocessed.wav'
    try:
        subprocess.run([
            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath,
            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', out
        ], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
        if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out) > 100:
            return out
    except:
        pass
    return filepath


def transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret_key, app_id='', progress_cb=None):
    """百度语音识别API"""
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在获取百度Token...')

    # 获取token
    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': api_key, 'client_secret': secret_key}, timeout=10)
    token = resp.json().get('access_token')
    if not token:
        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')

    # 读取音频
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        audio_data = f.read()

    if len(audio_data) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
        # 长音频分段处理
        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb)

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音...')

    payload = {
        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
        'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
        'token': token,
        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
        'len': len(audio_data),
        'dev_pid': 1537
    }
    resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
    result = resp.json()
    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
    raise Exception(f'百度识别失败[{result.get("err_no")}]: {result.get("err_msg", "未知错误")}')


def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb=None):
    """长音频分段百度识别"""
    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
    subprocess.run([
        'ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '55',
        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-y', chunk_pattern
    ], capture_output=True, timeout=120)

    chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
    if not chunks:
        raise Exception('音频分段失败')

    results = []
    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(chunks)}...')
        with open(chunk, 'rb') as f:
            audio_data = f.read()
        payload = {
            'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
            'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
            'token': token,
            'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
            'len': len(audio_data),
            'dev_pid': 1537
        }
        try:
            resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
            r = resp.json()
            if r.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
                results.append(''.join(r.get('result', [])))
        except:
            pass
        os.remove(chunk)
    os.rmdir(tmpdir)
    return ''.join(results)


def transcribe_groq(filepath, api_key, progress_cb=None):
    """Groq Whisper API转录"""
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在使用Groq Whisper转写...')
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        resp = requests.post('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions',
            headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
            data={'model': 'whisper-large-v3', 'language': 'zh', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
                  'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
            timeout=180)
    data = resp.json()
    if 'text' not in data:
        raise Exception(f'Groq识别失败: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)[:200]}')

    text = data['text']
    words = []
    if 'words' in data:
        for w in data['words']:
            words.append({'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0})
    return text, words or None


def transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir=None, progress_cb=None):
    """Sherpa-ONNX 纯本地离线语音识别（适合无网络/无VPN的手机）
    使用FunASR Paraformer模型的ONNX版本，50-80MB，手机可跑。
    """
    try:
        import sherpa_onnx
    except ImportError:
        raise Exception('请安装 sherpa-onnx: pip install sherpa-onnx\n'
                        '模型下载: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases')

    if model_dir is None:
        # 优先使用内置模型（打包在APK中）
        builtin = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))), 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            model_dir = builtin
        else:
            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
            if kv_platform == 'android':
                from android.storage import app_storage_path
                model_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
            else:
                model_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')

    if not os.path.exists(model_path):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('首次使用，正在下载离线模型(约80MB)...')
        from core.model_download import download_model
        download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在加载离线识别模型...')

    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
        paraformer=model_path,
        tokens=tokens_path,
        num_threads=4,
        sample_rate=16000,
        decoding_method='greedy_search',
    )

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音（离线）...')

    # 读取音频
    import wave
    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1 and wf.getsampwidth() == 2
        samples = wf.readframes(wf.getnframes())

    import struct
    samples = struct.unpack(f'{len(samples)//2}h', samples)
    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]

    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)

    text = stream.result.text.strip()
    # Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer支持时间戳
    words = None
    if hasattr(stream.result, 'timestamps') and stream.result.timestamps:
        words = []
        ts_list = stream.result.timestamps
        chars = list(text.replace(' ', ''))
        for i, ch in enumerate(chars):
            if i < len(ts_list):
                start = ts_list[i]
                end = ts_list[i + 1] if i + 1 < len(ts_list) else start + 0.3
                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': start, 'end': end, 'confidence': 1.0})

    return text, words


def _download_paraformer_model(dest_dir, progress_cb=None):
    """下载Paraformer离线模型（约50MB）"""
    import tarfile, io
    url = 'https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'
    # 国内镜像
    mirror_url = 'https://hub.nuaa.cf/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'

    os.makedirs(dest_dir, exist_ok=True)
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在下载离线识别模型(约50MB)...')

    for u in [mirror_url, url]:
        try:
            resp = requests.get(u, stream=True, timeout=30)
            resp.raise_for_status()
            data = io.BytesIO()
            total = int(resp.headers.get('content-length', 0))
            downloaded = 0
            for chunk in resp.iter_content(8192):
                data.write(chunk)
                downloaded += len(chunk)
                if progress_cb and total:
                    pct = int(downloaded * 100 / total)
                    progress_cb(f'下载模型: {pct}% ({downloaded//1024//1024}MB)')
            data.seek(0)
            with tarfile.open(fileobj=data, mode='r:bz2') as tar:
                tar.extractall(dest_dir)
            if progress_cb:
                progress_cb('模型下载完成')
            return True
        except:
            continue
    raise Exception('模型下载失败，请手动下载')


def transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb=None):
    """调用局域网内电脑上的FunASR服务
    手机和电脑在同一WiFi下，手机发送音频文件到电脑的FunASR服务。
    server_url 格式: http://192.168.x.x:8765
    """
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在连接FunASR服务...')

    # 先检查服务是否可用
    try:
        r = requests.get(f'{server_url}/health', timeout=3)
        if r.status_code != 200:
            raise Exception('FunASR服务未响应')
    except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
        raise Exception(f'无法连接FunASR服务 ({server_url})\n请确认：\n1. 电脑已启动FunASR服务\n2. 手机和电脑在同一WiFi\n3. IP地址正确')

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在上传音频到FunASR...')

    # 上传音频文件进行转录
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe_file',
            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f)},
            timeout=600)

    # 如果服务端不支持文件上传，回退到路径模式（同机调试用）
    if resp.status_code == 404:
        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe',
            json={'file_path': os.path.abspath(filepath)}, timeout=600)

    data = resp.json()
    if not data.get('success'):
        raise Exception(data.get('error', 'FunASR转写失败'))

    text = data.get('text', '')
    timestamps = data.get('timestamp')
    words = None

    if timestamps and len(timestamps) > 0:
        # 将字符级时间戳转为词级（简单按字切分）
        words = []
        for i, ch in enumerate(text):
            if ch.strip() and i < len(timestamps):
                ts = timestamps[i]
                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': ts[0] / 1000, 'end': ts[1] / 1000, 'confidence': 1.0})

    return text, words


def transcribe_audio(filepath, provider='baidu_builtin', keys=None, progress_cb=None):
    """统一转录入口"""
    keys = keys or {}
    filepath = preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb)

    if provider == 'sherpa_offline':
        model_dir = keys.get('model_dir')
        return transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir, progress_cb)

    if provider == 'funasr':
        server_url = keys.get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
        return transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb)

    if provider in ('baidu', 'baidu_builtin'):
        api_key = keys.get('key', 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W')
        secret = keys.get('secret', 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4')
        app_id = keys.get('app_id', '122105243')
        text = transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret, app_id, progress_cb)
        return text, None

    elif provider == 'groq_whisper':
        return transcribe_groq(filepath, keys['key'], progress_cb)

    elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('正在使用OpenAI Whisper转写...')
        with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
            resp = requests.post('https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions',
                headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {keys["key"]}'},
                files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
                data={'model': 'whisper-1', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
                      'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
                timeout=120)
        data = resp.json()
        text = data.get('text', '')
        words = [{'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0}
                 for w in data.get('words', [])] or None
        return text, words

    raise Exception(f'不支持的ASR服务: {provider}')

"""语音转录模块 - Android版，使用云端ASR API"""
import os, json, base64, tempfile, subprocess
import requests
from typing import Optional, Callable

def _convert_silk_to_wav(silk_path, output_path=None):
    """将微信SILK/AMR格式音频转为WAV
    微信语音消息格式：.amr 或 .silk（实际是silk v3编码）
    """
    if output_path is None:
        output_path = silk_path.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '.wav'

    # 尝试用ffmpeg转换（支持amr和大部分格式）
    try:
        subprocess.run([
            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', silk_path,
            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',
            output_path
        ], capture_output=True, timeout=30)
        if os.path.exists(output_path) and os.path.getsize(output_path) > 100:
            return output_path
    except:
        pass

    # 尝试用silk-decoder（针对silk v3格式）
    try:
        subprocess.run(['silk_decoder', silk_path, output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')],
                       capture_output=True, timeout=10)
        pcm_path = output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')
        if os.path.exists(pcm_path):
            subprocess.run([
                'ffmpeg', '-y', '-f', 's16le', '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1',
                '-i', pcm_path, output_path
            ], capture_output=True, timeout=10)
            os.remove(pcm_path)
            if os.path.exists(output_path):
                return output_path
    except:
        pass

    return silk_path  # 返回原文件，让ASR尝试处理


def preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb=None):
    """音频预处理：格式转换 + 重采样"""
    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()

    # 微信语音格式需要特殊处理
    if ext in ('.silk', '.amr', '.slk'):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('正在转换微信语音格式...')
        wav_path = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_converted.wav'
        return _convert_silk_to_wav(filepath, wav_path)

    # 其他格式用ffmpeg统一转为16kHz WAV
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在预处理音频...')
    out = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_preprocessed.wav'
    try:
        subprocess.run([
            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath,
            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', out
        ], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
        if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out) > 100:
            return out
    except:
        pass
    return filepath


def transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret_key, app_id='', progress_cb=None):
    """百度语音识别API"""
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在获取百度Token...')

    # 获取token
    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': api_key, 'client_secret': secret_key}, timeout=10)
    token = resp.json().get('access_token')
    if not token:
        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')

    # 读取音频
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        audio_data = f.read()

    if len(audio_data) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
        # 长音频分段处理
        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb)

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音...')

    payload = {
        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
        'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
        'token': token,
        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
        'len': len(audio_data),
        'dev_pid': 1537
    }
    resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
    result = resp.json()
    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
    raise Exception(f'百度识别失败[{result.get("err_no")}]: {result.get("err_msg", "未知错误")}')


def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb=None):
    """长音频分段百度识别"""
    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
    subprocess.run([
        'ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '55',
        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-y', chunk_pattern
    ], capture_output=True, timeout=120)

    chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
    if not chunks:
        raise Exception('音频分段失败')

    results = []
    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(chunks)}...')
        with open(chunk, 'rb') as f:
            audio_data = f.read()
        payload = {
            'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
            'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
            'token': token,
            'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
            'len': len(audio_data),
            'dev_pid': 1537
        }
        try:
            resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
            r = resp.json()
            if r.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
                results.append(''.join(r.get('result', [])))
        except:
            pass
        os.remove(chunk)
    os.rmdir(tmpdir)
    return ''.join(results)


def transcribe_groq(filepath, api_key, progress_cb=None):
    """Groq Whisper API转录"""
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在使用Groq Whisper转写...')
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        resp = requests.post('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions',
            headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
            data={'model': 'whisper-large-v3', 'language': 'zh', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
                  'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
            timeout=180)
    data = resp.json()
    if 'text' not in data:
        raise Exception(f'Groq识别失败: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)[:200]}')

    text = data['text']
    words = []
    if 'words' in data:
        for w in data['words']:
            words.append({'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0})
    return text, words or None


def transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir=None, progress_cb=None):
    """Sherpa-ONNX 纯本地离线语音识别（适合无网络/无VPN的手机）
    使用FunASR Paraformer模型的ONNX版本，50-80MB，手机可跑。
    """
    try:
        import sherpa_onnx
    except ImportError:
        raise Exception('请安装 sherpa-onnx: pip install sherpa-onnx\n'
                        '模型下载: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases')

    if model_dir is None:
        # 优先使用内置模型（打包在APK中）
        builtin = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))), 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            model_dir = builtin
        else:
            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
            if kv_platform == 'android':
                from android.storage import app_storage_path
                model_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
            else:
                model_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')

    if not os.path.exists(model_path):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('首次使用，正在下载离线模型(约80MB)...')
        from core.model_download import download_model
        download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在加载离线识别模型...')

    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
        paraformer=model_path,
        tokens=tokens_path,
        num_threads=4,
        sample_rate=16000,
        decoding_method='greedy_search',
    )

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音（离线）...')

    # 读取音频
    import wave
    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1 and wf.getsampwidth() == 2
        samples = wf.readframes(wf.getnframes())

    import struct
    samples = struct.unpack(f'{len(samples)//2}h', samples)
    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]

    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)

    text = stream.result.text.strip()
    # Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer支持时间戳
    words = None
    if hasattr(stream.result, 'timestamps') and stream.result.timestamps:
        words = []
        ts_list = stream.result.timestamps
        chars = list(text.replace(' ', ''))
        for i, ch in enumerate(chars):
            if i < len(ts_list):
                start = ts_list[i]
                end = ts_list[i + 1] if i + 1 < len(ts_list) else start + 0.3
                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': start, 'end': end, 'confidence': 1.0})

    return text, words


def _download_paraformer_model(dest_dir, progress_cb=None):
    """下载Paraformer离线模型（约50MB）"""
    import tarfile, io
    url = 'https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'
    # 国内镜像
    mirror_url = 'https://hub.nuaa.cf/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'

    os.makedirs(dest_dir, exist_ok=True)
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在下载离线识别模型(约50MB)...')

    for u in [mirror_url, url]:
        try:
            resp = requests.get(u, stream=True, timeout=30)
            resp.raise_for_status()
            data = io.BytesIO()
            total = int(resp.headers.get('content-length', 0))
            downloaded = 0
            for chunk in resp.iter_content(8192):
                data.write(chunk)
                downloaded += len(chunk)
                if progress_cb and total:
                    pct = int(downloaded * 100 / total)
                    progress_cb(f'下载模型: {pct}% ({downloaded//1024//1024}MB)')
            data.seek(0)
            with tarfile.open(fileobj=data, mode='r:bz2') as tar:
                tar.extractall(dest_dir)
            if progress_cb:
                progress_cb('模型下载完成')
            return True
        except:
            continue
    raise Exception('模型下载失败，请手动下载')


def transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb=None):
    """调用局域网内电脑上的FunASR服务
    手机和电脑在同一WiFi下，手机发送音频文件到电脑的FunASR服务。
    server_url 格式: http://192.168.x.x:8765
    """
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在连接FunASR服务...')

    # 先检查服务是否可用
    try:
        r = requests.get(f'{server_url}/health', timeout=3)
        if r.status_code != 200:
            raise Exception('FunASR服务未响应')
    except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
        raise Exception(f'无法连接FunASR服务 ({server_url})\n请确认：\n1. 电脑已启动FunASR服务\n2. 手机和电脑在同一WiFi\n3. IP地址正确')

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在上传音频到FunASR...')

    # 上传音频文件进行转录
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe_file',
            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f)},
            timeout=600)

    # 如果服务端不支持文件上传，回退到路径模式（同机调试用）
    if resp.status_code == 404:
        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe',
            json={'file_path': os.path.abspath(filepath)}, timeout=600)

    data = resp.json()
    if not data.get('success'):
        raise Exception(data.get('error', 'FunASR转写失败'))

    text = data.get('text', '')
    timestamps = data.get('timestamp')
    words = None

    if timestamps and len(timestamps) > 0:
        # 将字符级时间戳转为词级（简单按字切分）
        words = []
        for i, ch in enumerate(text):
            if ch.strip() and i < len(timestamps):
                ts = timestamps[i]
                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': ts[0] / 1000, 'end': ts[1] / 1000, 'confidence': 1.0})

    return text, words


def transcribe_audio(filepath, provider='baidu_builtin', keys=None, progress_cb=None):
    """统一转录入口"""
    keys = keys or {}
    filepath = preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb)

    if provider == 'sherpa_offline':
        model_dir = keys.get('model_dir')
        return transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir, progress_cb)

    if provider == 'funasr':
        server_url = keys.get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
        return transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb)

    if provider in ('baidu', 'baidu_builtin'):
        api_key = keys.get('key', 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W')
        secret = keys.get('secret', 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4')
        app_id = keys.get('app_id', '122105243')
        text = transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret, app_id, progress_cb)
        return text, None

    elif provider == 'groq_whisper':
        return transcribe_groq(filepath, keys['key'], progress_cb)

    elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('正在使用OpenAI Whisper转写...')
        with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
            resp = requests.post('https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions',
                headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {keys["key"]}'},
                files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
                data={'model': 'whisper-1', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
                      'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
                timeout=120)
        data = resp.json()
        text = data.get('text', '')
        words = [{'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0}
                 for w in data.get('words', [])] or None
        return text, words

    raise Exception(f'不支持的ASR服务: {provider}')

content.text: Now let me handle Task #2 — improving offline recognition accuracy. The current model is `sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14` which is a basic int8 quantized model. To improve accuracy, I'll update the Sherpa-ONNX recognition to use better decoding parameters and add VAD (Voice Activity Detection) for better segmentation:

def transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir=None, progress_cb=None):
    """Sherpa-ONNX 纯本地离线语音识别（适合无网络/无VPN的手机）
    使用FunASR Paraformer模型的ONNX版本，50-80MB，手机可跑。
    """
    try:
        import sherpa_onnx
    except ImportError:
        raise Exception('请安装 sherpa-onnx: pip install sherpa-onnx\n'
                        '模型下载: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases')

    if model_dir is None:
        # 优先使用内置模型（打包在APK中）
        builtin = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))), 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            model_dir = builtin
        else:
            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
            if kv_platform == 'android':
                from android.storage import app_storage_path
                model_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
            else:
                model_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')

    if not os.path.exists(model_path):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('首次使用，正在下载离线模型(约80MB)...')
        from core.model_download import download_model
        download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在加载离线识别模型...')

    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
        paraformer=model_path,
        tokens=tokens_path,
        num_threads=4,
        sample_rate=16000,
        decoding_method='greedy_search',
    )

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音（离线）...')

    # 读取音频
    import wave
    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1 and wf.getsampwidth() == 2
        samples = wf.readframes(wf.getnframes())

    import struct
    samples = struct.unpack(f'{len(samples)//2}h', samples)
    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]

    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)

    text = stream.result.text.strip()
    # Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer支持时间戳
    words = None
    if hasattr(stream.result, 'timestamps') and stream.result.timestamps:
        words = []
        ts_list = stream.result.timestamps
        chars = list(text.replace(' ', ''))
        for i, ch in enumerate(chars):
            if i < len(ts_list):
                start = ts_list[i]
                end = ts_list[i + 1] if i + 1 < len(ts_list) else start + 0.3
                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': start, 'end': end, 'confidence': 1.0})

    return text, words
